title: RetroMMO
description: RetroMMO is an online role-playing game which pairs the core game mechanics of classic JRPGs such as Dragon Quest and Final Fantasy with the format of a modern MMO.
keywords: retrommo, retro mmo, jrpg mmo, oldschool mmo, old school mmo, turn-based mmo, turn based mmo, turnbased mmo, jrpg, mmo
